_note: v2: the game is the anchor, not a style suffix. CLIP weights early tokens hardest, so {game} leads the prompt and repeats mid-prompt; rubric now scores game_reference and the judge caps off-game images.
template: {game} video game key art: armored {subject} centered in a recognizable {game} landscape, signature {game} creatures and scenery in the background, faithful {game} art direction, legendary loot glowing at their feet, {palette} palette, {lighting}, heroic low-angle shot, clean bottom band left empty for composited text
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low contrast, dull colors, extra limbs, generic fantasy setting, unrelated game

rubric.game_reference: 1-5 — is THIS game unmistakable (creatures, environment, art style)?
